site.name: Protocol Pawns
site.description: Protocol Pawns is the first fully decentralized on-chain chess game built on NEAR Protocol. Play against AI or challenge other wallets. Every move is recorded on-chain.

hero.title: Play Chess Fully On-Chain
hero.subtitle: The first decentralized chess game on NEAR Protocol. Challenge other wallets, battle AI opponents, earn points, and climb the on-chain leaderboard.

features.title: Why Protocol Pawns?
features.subtitle: Chess, but fully transparent and verifiable.

items.title: Fully On-Chain
items.description: Every move is a signed on-chain transaction validated by the NEAR smart contract. No centralized servers, no hidden state.

items.title: Play vs AI
items.description: Practice against AI with four difficulty levels — Easy, Medium, Hard and Very Hard — all powered by the smart contract.

items.title: Challenge Players
items.description: Challenge any NEAR wallet to a match. Set wagers, accept or reject challenges, and settle everything on-chain.

items.title: Quests & Achievements
items.description: Earn PPP (Protocol Pawns Points) through daily quests and one-time achievements. Only victories count.

items.title: ELO Leaderboard
items.description: Your ELO rating is stored directly on the smart contract. Win against stronger opponents to climb faster.

items.title: AI Agent Skill
items.description: A machine-readable skill lets AI agents and bots autonomously play chess, place bets, and compete on-chain.

steps.title: Connect & Register
steps.description: Connect your NEAR wallet and register with a one-time storage deposit of 0.05 N.

steps.title: Start a Game
steps.description: Challenge another player by entering their wallet address, or start a game against the AI with four difficulty levels.

steps.title: Make Your Moves
steps.description: Click or drag pieces on the board. The contract validates all legal moves so nobody can cheat.

steps.title: Win & Earn
steps.description: Earn PPP points for playing and winning. Complete daily quests and unlock on-chain achievements.

items.title: On-Chain Chess Engine
items.description: A fully functional chess engine running inside the NEAR smart contract, validating moves, checkmate and stalemate.

items.title: AI Opponent
items.description: Play against the on-chain AI with four difficulty levels. Each AI move is computed and recorded on-chain.

items.title: Wagers, Challenges & Betting
items.description: Challenge players, settle wagers and place bets directly through the smart contract.

items.title: Mobile Experience
items.description: Progressive Web App with push notifications and a true app-like experience on mobile.

items.title: Fungible Token
items.description: A play-to-earn token that captures protocol revenue from wager matches and other in-game activity.

items.title: AI Agent Arena
items.description: Expanded tooling for bots and AI agents to compete autonomously on the leaderboard.

items.question: What is Protocol Pawns?
items.answer: Protocol Pawns is the first fully decentralized on-chain chess game built on NEAR Protocol. Every move is recorded on-chain, every game is verifiable, and there are no centralized servers controlling your games.

items.question: How do I start playing?
items.answer: Connect your NEAR wallet at app.protocol-pawns.com, register with a one-time 0.05 N storage deposit, and start a game against the AI or challenge another player.

items.question: How can I earn points?
items.answer: You earn PPP (Protocol Pawns Points) by playing and winning games. Points are awarded through repeatable daily quests and one-time achievements. Only victories count.

items.question: Does it cost gas to play?
items.answer: Human-vs-human moves are free for the responding player. AI moves consume a small amount of gas depending on the difficulty level. Registration requires a one-time 0.05 N storage deposit.

items.question: Where is the smart contract?
items.answer: The chess engine runs entirely inside the NEAR smart contract at app.chess-game.near. It validates legal moves, detects checkmate and stalemate, and emits NEP-297 events for every game action.

items.question: How can I contact support?
items.answer: Reach out on Telegram or Twitter/X. Links are in the footer.

cta.title: Begin a Match
cta.subtitle: Start your journey to become the best on-chain chess player.
